description: CompositionBlack T-shirt made of 100% recycled polyester, has a round neck, short sleeves, reinforced seams on the back to extend durability, and logo printed on the left chestFittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash in cool waterDo not bleachTumble dry at low temperatureCool ironDo not dry cleanRun those marathons in ease with this ultra-comfortable polyester T-shirt from nike. Designed to wick sweat away and keep you fresh and comfortable all day, this T-shirt looks great with capris and sneakers.
